brief: Ledgerly, a B2B accounting SaaS, needs a five-email onboarding nurture sequence for new trial users. Each email must have a subject line, body copy, and a call to action, and the sequence must follow a clear narrative arc from welcome to upgrade prompt. Budget is $1400.
reference: A strong deliverable is a five-email onboarding nurture sequence where each email has a subject line, body copy, and a call to action, and the sequence follows a clear narrative arc from a welcome email through an upgrade prompt. It must not promise guaranteed open rates, guarantee deliverability, set up marketing automation, or perform legal compliance review.
